customers_say: Customers find the digital lock to be feature-rich with multiple unlocking options and appreciate its functionality, with one mentioning it works well on wooden doors. The installation and service receive positive feedback, and customers value its security and ease of use, with one noting it's easy for different family members to use. The value for money receives mixed reviews, with several customers finding it overpriced.

reviews.author: Garima
reviews.title: Please Dont Buy Godrej Lock
reviews.body: 3rd class service hei, Godrej ki, pls dont buy, product features bhaut ache hei, but build quality bilkul 0 hei, aaj 8 june 2026 ko almost 2 month ho gaye lock liye, but lock ka camera lock lagne k 2 din baad hi zor sei gate band hone par hi gir padda, and wo aaj tak camera ka part na to chnage kiya na hi fix kiya usko, aap agr NCR mei rehte hei to pls bilkul bhi buy mat karna, Service bhaut kharab hei, 15 eamils godrej ko kiye, every time ticket genrate k alwa kuch nahi. no response. Amazon ke kehne par kai baar jo godrej ko jo mail kya, uske sare proof amazon k sath bhi share kiye, but aaj t

reviews.author: Rakesh Roshan Koul
reviews.title: Excellent Smart Lock for a Secure and Modern Home
reviews.body: This digital lock from Godrej is an excellent addition to any home. I am writing this review after using it for about a month, and it has been working flawlessly. The lock offers multiple access options, including biometric fingerprint recognition, RFID card access, a 6-digit password, Wi-Fi connectivity, and traditional keys. During installation, the technician will configure all the lock settings and explain the features. It’s a good idea to note these settings for future reference, especially if you need to add or modify user access later. The lock is powered by four AA batteries. For bette

reviews.author: Sushmita Sarma
reviews.title: Good
reviews.body: Technician was very good with his service. Hassle free installation. Good product

reviews.author: Rashmi
reviews.title: Safety
reviews.body: Excellent product very useful and safe to use. The technician explained the whole process and made it user friendly for us.
